other_observers: None.; Yes, I am the original finder.
description: I initially thought the bird was a Warbling Vireo when first observed with the naked eye. Once I put bins on it, however, I noted the extensive yellow underparts, dark lores and eyeline, and darkish gray cap. I started taking pictures immediately and didn't look at the bird again in the field as it left shortly afterwards.Behaviors: Responded with scolding call to my pishing.Call: I initially detected the bird while pishing and it responded with a typical raspy vireo scolding call.Plumage: Alternate
photographer: Photographer: Doug Faulkner, Doug Faulkner, Doug Faulkner
